positive: A stylized minimalist depiction of a forest animal, specifically a howling wolf head and antlers silhouette, integrated with swirling geometric mountain peaks and abstract constellations. The style should be neo-tribal tattoo art mixed with detailed linework illustration, using a limited palette of deep indigo blue, burnt ochre, and stark off-white. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast for optimal print clarity. The composition should be vertically centered, ideal for merchandise like t-shirts or posters. Include elements of natural flow and cyclical patterns. Vector graphic quality, intricate line work, negative space emphasis.
